---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, missing, outdated, or platform-specific documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Page or file

Which file needs documentation work?

## Problem

- [ ] Unclear wording
- [ ] Missing setup step
- [ ] Platform-specific behavior is not labeled
- [ ] Link or filename is wrong
- [ ] Safety limitation is missing or overstated
- [ ] Example is hard to adapt
- [ ] Other:

## Suggested fix

Describe the change you would make.

## Platform context

If this is platform-specific, name the platform and version if known.

## Safety note

Do not include private file paths, private logs, credentials, or real user data.
